code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ChatBox=_ref=>{let{sendMessage,messages}=_ref;const[input,setInput]=useState('');const handleSendMessage=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(input.trim()){sendMessage(input);setInput('');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chat-box",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"messages",children:messages.map((msg,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"message",children:msg},index))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSendMessage,className:"chat-input",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:input,onChange:e=>setInput(e.target.value),placeholder:"Type your message..."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Send"})]})]});};export default ChatBox;
